name: mymsd-form-helper
description: Helps you fill in NZ MSD (Work & Income) forms for benefits, accommodation supplement, and reviews. Drafts only — you submit.
longDescription: Translates the bureaucratic language of MSD / Work & Income forms into plain English, helps you gather the supporting evidence each section needs, and produces a draft you can copy into MyMSD. Covers Jobseeker Support, Sole Parent Support, Supported Living Payment, Accommodation Supplement, Special Needs Grant, and re-applications / reviews. Does not log into MyMSD. Does not file. Strict about not giving legal or financial advice.
